points_of_interest.name: Uninhabited Cave
points_of_interest.text: Makes it Safer to spend the night and protects when it's Raining.

points_of_interest.name: Wooden Watchtower
points_of_interest.text: Gives a Vantage Point. Old and creaky; has a chance of collapsing.

points_of_interest.name: Hunting Trail
points_of_interest.text: Fast Trajectory when traveling through the trail, but is Deadly.

points_of_interest.name: Abandoned Chapel
points_of_interest.text: Dedicated to a random deity. Possibly haunted.

points_of_interest.name: Buried Treasure
points_of_interest.text: Recent rains left the chest partially revealed. Guarded by a will-o'-wisp.

points_of_interest.name: Grove of Heart Palms
points_of_interest.text: Trees with heart-shaped fronds. 1d4 chutes can be foraged; eating one has the effect of a healing potion.

points_of_interest.name: Adventurers' Cache
points_of_interest.text: A rival adventuring party stashed 1d6 torches and 1d6 rations here.

points_of_interest.name: Desecrated Monument
points_of_interest.text: Old statue emanates necromantic energy. Attracts ghouls at night.

points_of_interest.name: Fey-Kept Orchard
points_of_interest.text: Forage automatically succeeds here, but angers a nearby curupira.

points_of_interest.name: Stargazer Monoliths
points_of_interest.text: Sleeping in this henge gives prophetic dreams. Get a Luck Token.

points_of_interest.name: Ancient Portals
points_of_interest.text: Lies inactive. Reactivation connects it to other portals.

points_of_interest.name: Earthmote
points_of_interest.text: Floating over the land. Atop is the cabin of a wizard named Randall, who gives good advice, making it Safer for the next 3 days.

quick_encounters.name: Dark Clouds
quick_encounters.text: It will rain soon. Raining and Reduced Visibility next Watch.

quick_encounters.name: Hungry Vermin
quick_encounters.text: A rat got into someone's backpack and ate all their rations.

quick_encounters.name: Mosquito Fever
quick_encounters.text: Easy CON or take 1d4 CON damage (can't heal while sick). Repeat the check once per day; ends on success.

quick_encounters.name: Shooting Star
quick_encounters.text: Make a wish! Someone gets a Luck Token.

quick_encounters.name: Landslide
quick_encounters.text: Soil shifts beneath your feet! Normal DEX or take 2d6 damage.

quick_encounters.name: Hole in Backpack
quick_encounters.text: A character notices their backpack is ruptured. Lose an item.

quick_encounters.name: Quicksand
quick_encounters.text: Someone falls face-first. Hard DEX to exit, Hard STR to be pulled out. CON check each round to hold breath or take 1d6 damage.

quick_encounters.name: Bad Omen
quick_encounters.text: A black cat crosses the path or ominous bird sounds bring bad luck. Roll with disadvantage next Watch.

quick_encounters.name: Psychic Crickets
quick_encounters.text: An unnerving humming sound. Normal CHA or take 2d6 damage.

terrain_features.name: Cliff
terrain_features.text: Treat as Impassable Terrain. Climbing: the party can try to climb past if all beat a Normal STR check.

terrain_features.name: River
terrain_features.text: Treat as Impassable Terrain with Waterways. Crossing: the party can try to swim past if all beat a STR check (Hard for rapids, Easy for slow streams).

terrain_features.name: Road
terrain_features.text: Automatic success on Navigate and Fast Trajectory when keeping to the road. Maintained Roads are usually patrolled: Safer if party members aren't outlaws, otherwise Deadly.

transport_modes.name: Mount
transport_modes.text: Mounts made for fast transport (e.g. horses) speed up travel. Rush: once per day, gain an additional Journey Round in the same watch. You can't rush from a terrain with Broken Paths.

transport_modes.name: Boat
transport_modes.text: Canoes, sailboats, longships and other vessels travel through Waterways. Boats not powered by the party aren't limited to 2 Watches of travel a day.

transport_modes.name: Airship
transport_modes.text: Airships can travel over Impassable Terrain and ignore Arduous Terrain.

constants.encounterRule: d12 + Safety Level < ER => dangerous encounter; a natural 12 => an encounter with no immediate danger.
